positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The composition features bold, dark silhouettes of ancient, twisting trees and stylized woodland creatures (foxes, deer, owls) nestled among large, abstract foliage shapes. The color palette is deep indigo, midnight blue, forest green, and pop accents of pale gold or ethereal lavender. The style should mimic contemporary Nordic folk art mixed with elegant vector illustration, ensuring clean lines and high contrast. The main subject should be centered, suitable for repeating or single-placement apparel design. Highly detailed, graphic novel quality, perfect for screen printing on dark fabric, vector art look.
